patch.value: Fix notify-website-sync: drop misleading source_repo alias

pm-web's notify-website-sync.yml was dispatching {source_repo: unbraind/pm-web, source_ref: <web-sha>} to the companion's deploy.yml. The companion treats source_repo/source_ref as legacy aliases for pm_cli_source_repo/pm_cli_source_ref, so the docs build then tried to fetch pm-cli docs (e.g. docs/QUICKSTART.md) from pm-web instead, hitting HTTP 404 for all of them and producing only 7/19 partials before the verify step failed (test -f website/index.html). Fix: only send pm_web_source_repo/pm_web_source_ref in the dispatch payload.

Fixed: notify-website-sync.yml now only sends pm_web_source_repo/pm_web_source_ref. The source_repo/source_ref aliases were causing the companion docs build to fetch pm-cli docs from pm-web (HTTP 404 across docs/*.md).
